abilities.name: Governor's Gift
abilities.description: Choose a gender. Gain + on Bewitch and Scrutiny duels vs chosen gender.

abilities.name: Grace Under Fire
abilities.description: Uses Grace instead of Speed for Defense and Initiative.

abilities.name: Don't Mind Me (11)
abilities.description: If no offensive actions last turn, enemies must succeed TN 11 Scrutiny Challenge or choose different target.

actions: (1) B&D Pocket (Pistol) | AV: 2 (7) | Rg: z6 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/3 damage. Capacity 4, Reload 2.
system.notes: Highest echelons of Malifaux society. Weaponize gossip, bribery, and conspiracy to ruin rivals for sport.
